input: Imagine a self-contained, hypothetical world with only the following conditions, and without any unmentioned factors or causal relationships: Jyka has a direct effect on hwax. Lirg has a direct effect on hwax. Method 1: We look at how jyka correlates with lirg case by case according to hwax. Method 2: We look directly at how jyka correlates with lirg in general. To understand how jyka affects lirg, is it more correct to use the Method 1 than Method 2?
